items.summary: Fix the public query method in backend/main.mo to ensure it returns all lease listings without requiring authentication, and verify it is properly exposed as a public query function

Update frontend/src/components/LeaseListings.tsx to properly fetch and display all existing lease entries from the backend, showing partial lease code (first 4 chars + '...' + first 4 chars after last hyphen, e.g., '2793...2003'), split ratio (e.g., '60/40'), and availability status with proper styling (green for Available, red/grayed for Unavailable)

Add a copy full code button for each lease listing that copies the complete UUID to clipboard when clicked, and disable/grey out this button when the lease is unavailable with a message 'This code is already in use. Please try another.'
Handle empty lease listings state by displaying a friendly message like 'No leases available yet — check back soon!' when the backend returns an empty array
